segments.speaker: 题目4/5
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Hi, Lisa. Do you have any plans for the weekend? Well, I did want to go to baseball game in center city on Saturday, but the weather's not looking too good. Yes, storms are forecast all weekend, I think. Right. So I decided to go to that new art gallery in town this week. Better to do something indoors. Good thinking. I went last week and there were a few sculptures by a local artist that really caught my eye to check them out. Oh, nice tip. I can't wait to see them.
